ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size entry */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age group the size is intended for */,
  "product_size" TEXT /* Product size as per the retailer's standard */,
  "chest_size" INTEGER /* Chest size in centimeters */,
  "waist_size" INTEGER /* Waist size in centimeters */,
  "hip_size" INTEGER /* Hip size in centimeters */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region ID to track regional variations */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender (Boy/Girl) the size is intended for */,
  "height_range" TEXT /* Height range the size is intended for */,
  "shoulder_width" INTEGER /* Shoulder width in centimeters */,
  "arm_length" INTEGER /* Arm length in centimeters */,
  "leg_length" INTEGER /* Leg length in centimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the region */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the customer is located */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the child */,
  "child_birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the child */,
  "child_height" INTEGER /* Height of the child in centimeters */,
  "child_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the child in kilograms */,
  "child_body_type" TEXT /* Body type of the child */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* Customer preferences and fit history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product purchased */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Size ID of the product purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the purchase was made */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status indicating if the product was returned */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the purchase */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the purchase */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the product is suitable for */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the product is intended for */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group the product is intended for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing the feedback */,
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purchase the feedback is related to */,
  "fit_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the fit from 1 to 5 */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the customer */,
  "fit_attributes" TEXT /* Specific attributes that were well-fitted or not */,
  "sizing_accuracy" INTEGER /* Rating of how accurate the size chart was */,
  "comfort_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the comfort of the clothing */,
  "durability_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the durability of the clothing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_purchase_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_id") REFERENCES purchases ("purchase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purchase the return is related to */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for returning the product */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the product was returned */,
  "return_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product returned */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Refund amount for the return */,
  "return_reason_category" TEXT /* Category of the return reason */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_purchase_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_id") REFERENCES purchases ("purchase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Size ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the inventory was updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Threshold for reordering */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for replenishment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)
